Orchestration & Mind (Electron Backend).description: The Electron entrypoint; initializes windows and starts the core services.
Central orchestrator for the Tala Mind.
Orchestration & Mind (Electron Backend).behavior: Coordinates brains, tools, and memory through a multi-turn autonomous loop. Handles tool extraction (JSON/XML) and session persistence.

Orchestration & Mind (Electron Backend).description: Service for managing and executing system and MCP tools.
Orchestration & Mind (Electron Backend).behavior: Registers tool schemas (File I/O, Browser, Terminal, Memory, Desktop) and dispatches execution calls. Integrated with auditLogger for compliance.
Maps IPC handles (e.g., 'tala:chat', 'logs:list') to specific service methods.
Manages DAG-based execution with support for conditional branching (if, guardrail) and iteration (split).

Orchestration & Mind (Electron Backend).description: Safety and validation layer for LLM inputs/outputs.
Orchestration & Mind (Electron Backend).behavior: Applies CustomLLM and Regex validators to prevent toxicity and PII leakage.

Brains & Inference.description: Driver for the local Ollama inference server.
Brains & Inference.behavior: Handles streaming and non-streaming chat completion requests. Implements repetition detection and phrase-based safety filters.
Exchanges tokens with remote APIs like OpenAI/Anthropic.

Brains & Inference.description: Manages LLM provider configurations and engine setup.
Brains & Inference.behavior: Scans for local llama.cpp or Ollama instances.

Memory & RAG (Python/MCP).behavior: Provides semantic search and document ingestion via MCP.

Memory & RAG (Python/MCP).description: Continuity memory server for tracking long-term facts.
Memory & RAG (Python/MCP).behavior: Persists specific user preferences and historical decisions.

Memory & RAG (Python/MCP).description: Graph database interface for relational memory.
Memory & RAG (Python/MCP).behavior: Performs hop-based neighborhood retrieval for context injection.

UI & Experience (React/Renderer).description: Root application component for the React frontend.
UI & Experience (React/Renderer).behavior: Composes the layout, activity bar, and panel system. Manages global UI state (chat history, active file).
Provides a xterm.js interface for shell interactions. Bridges to main process PTY via preload API.

UI & Experience (React/Renderer).description: Diagnostic and audit log visualization interface.
UI & Experience (React/Renderer).behavior: Renders real-time streams of system and AI audit records. Supports filtering, correlation, and health monitoring.

UI & Experience (React/Renderer).description: Visual graph editor for designing agent workflows.
UI & Experience (React/Renderer).behavior: Interactive ReactFlow canvas for constructing and debugging workflow DAGs.
